# glitchtip_project_keys (Data Source)

Lists all keys (DSNs) of a GlitchTip project. Useful for iterating over existing project keys (e.g. with `for_each`) without enumerating them by hand.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# List all keys (DSNs) of a project.
data "glitchtip_project_keys" "all" {
  organization = "acme-inc"
  project      = "api"
}

output "dsns" {
  value     = [for k in data.glitchtip_project_keys.all.keys : k.dsn["public"]]
  sensitive = true
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `organization` (String) Slug of the organization that owns the project.
- `project` (String) Slug of the project whose keys are listed.

### Read-Only

- `keys` (Attributes List) All keys (DSNs) of the project. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--keys))

<a id="nestedatt--keys"></a>
### Nested Schema for `keys`

Read-Only:

- `date_created` (String) RFC 3339 timestamp at which the key was created.
- `dsn` (Map of String) Map of DSN endpoints (e.g. `public`, `secret`, `security`) for this key.
- `id` (String) UUID identifier of the project key.
- `name` (String) Human-readable label for the key.
- `project_id` (Number) Numeric identifier of the project the key belongs to.
- `public` (String) Public key portion of the DSN.
